backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as a placeholder backend with no logic implemented.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping portfolio features (visual theme, hero section, about section, etc.) to their implementing files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark themes including backgrounds, foregrounds, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Khudrang Kalakaar Portfolio app, mounting the React app at the root div and loading the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes all portfolio sections—Navigation, Hero, About, Services, Why Choose, Featured Projects, Contact, and Footer—in order.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: Two-column about section displaying the artist portrait with decorative terracotta accents, bio text, a floating experience badge, and a stats row with years, projects, and satisfaction metrics.
frontend/src/components/ContactSection.t: Contact section with location, Instagram, and WhatsApp info cards plus CTA buttons linking to WhatsApp chat and the Instagram profile.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedProjects: Container component that defines five featured mural projects and renders them via ProjectSection with alternating layouts under a section header.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer displaying the Khudrang Kalakaar brand, copyright notice, Bikaner location, and a caffeine.ai attribution link with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, artist name, tagline, and CTA buttons that smooth-scroll to the About and Contact sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-spy active highlighting, smooth-scroll links, and a responsive mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ProjectSection.t: Reusable article component displaying a single portfolio project with a large image (70%) and a text panel (30%), supporting alternating left/right layouts.
Section listing seven wall-painting services in a responsive card grid, each with an icon, title, and short description.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseSection: Section presenting six trust/value points in a grid with numbered accents, explaining why clients should choose the artist.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout state and persisting identity across page reloads via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollSpy.ts: Custom hook that tracks which section ID is currently in view based on scroll position, returning the active section string.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Poppins font and Tailwind, defining CSS custom properties for the color system (terracotta palette, neutrals) and utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the App component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom colors (terracotta, sidebar, chart, etc. using oklch variables), fonts (Poppins), border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes for the portfolio frontend.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing a 10-page wall-painting artist portfolio for Mudit Sharma (Khudrang Kalakaar), including architectural notes, required images, and a list of implemented features.
